Home / Services / Website Hosting / Starter Hosting

🌱 Starter Hosting

Perfect for personal websites, blogs, portfolios, and small business sites that need reliable, affordable hosting. Our Starter Hosting plan includes 10GB SSD storage, unmetered bandwidth, a free SSL certificate, daily automated backups with one-click restore, and 99.9% uptime guarantee. Your site is hosted on high-performance cloud infrastructure with global CDN for fast loading anywhere in the world. We handle all server management, security patches, and monitoring — so you can focus on your business, not your hosting. Includes 1 email account and basic DDoS protection.

Service Details

Category: Website Hosting

Credits Price: 8 credits (approx. £10)

Turnaround: Monthly subscription

How to Book

  1. Create a free account
  2. Purchase credits or subscribe to a plan
  3. Select this service and submit your brief
  4. Receive your completed project within Monthly subscription
Book Starter Hosting Now

Related Website Hosting Services

  • Business Hosting — Enhanced hosting for growing businesses with 50GB SSD, staging environment, and priority support. (24 credits)
  • Professional Hosting — High-performance dedicated resources with 100GB NVMe, auto-scaling, and white-glove support. (48 credits)
  • Enterprise Hosting — Fully managed, high-availability hosting with dedicated infrastructure and 24/7 VIP support. (120 credits)

Why Choose Creative Kaygency for Starter Hosting?

  • Professional quality at credit-friendly prices
  • Fast turnaround: Monthly subscription
  • Satisfaction guarantee with included revisions

  • Save up to 20% by paying with credits
